headline: The FAA Is Upgrading Air Traffic Control. RTX, Leidos and Other Companies Are Doing the Work.
summary: It’s far too early to guess at the root causes of the recent tragedy at LaGuardia airport.  Several public and private companies are involved in efforts to improve the system.  Sunday night, an  Air Canada  flight arriving from Montreal struck a Port Authority Aircraft Rescue and Firefighting vehicle.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 700 Points On Trump's Iran Comments; Nvidia Stock Climbs (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes surged Monday as President Donald Trump announced productive peace talks with Iran. Nvidia was an early winner on the stock market today, as it looked to bounce back from recent losses.

headline: Tradr Set to Launch Leveraged ETFs on AMZN, AAOI, HL and IBM
summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, announced that it expects to launch four first-to-market single stock leveraged ETFs on Tuesday, March 24. The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver either two times the inverse (-200%) or two times long (200%) the daily performance of a specific underlying stock.

headline: IBM Debuts New AI Enabled Digital Experiences for the 90th Masters Tournament
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) and the Masters Tournament today announced new and enhanced digital fan features now available on the award-winning Masters digital platforms. The watsonx AI-powered capabilities – the latest in a 30-year collaboration between IBM and the Masters – are designed to bring the rich history and on-course excitement of the Tournament to life for millions of golf fans around the world.

headline: IBM Alliances Highlight Quantum And AI Upside For Undervalued Shares
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) recently outlined a quantum centric supercomputing architecture that combines classical, quantum and communication technologies. The company expanded its work with Lam Research to pursue semiconductor manufacturing capabilities targeting sub 1nm process nodes. IBM deepened its AI infrastructure collaboration with NVIDIA and broadened post quantum cryptography advisory services with Bain & Company. For investors, these moves place IBM in the mix of three key areas that many...
